note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.block module functions.

method_groups.force: force_app, force_app_x, force_app_y, force_app_z, force_unbal, force_unbal_x, force_unbal_y, force_unbal_z, set_force_app, set_force_app_x, set_force_app_y, set_force_app_z
method_groups.rvel: rvel, rvel_x, rvel_y, rvel_z, set_rvel, set_rvel_x, set_rvel_y, set_rvel_z
method_groups.velocity: set_velocity, set_velocity_x, set_velocity_y, set_velocity_z, velocity, velocity_x, velocity_y, velocity_z

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the surface area of a block.

methods.name: contacts
methods.description: Get contact list of a block.

methods.name: density
methods.description: Get the block density.

methods.name: dsf
methods.description: Get the block density scaling factor.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the block extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: faces
methods.description: Get face list of a block.

methods.name: force_app
methods.description: Get the block block appliad force (vector).

methods.name: force_app_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the block block appliad force.

methods.name: force_app_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the block block appliad force.

methods.name: force_app_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the block block appliad force.

methods.name: force_unbal
methods.description: Get the block block unbalance force (vector).

methods.name: force_unbal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the block block unbalance force.

methods.name: force_unbal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the block block unbalance force.

methods.name: force_unbal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the block block unbalance force.

methods.name: gridpoints
methods.description: Get a tuple the gridpoint objects which are part of this block.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the block group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: block.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the block. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this block is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the block id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: block.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the block is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the block index.

methods.name: is_excavated
methods.description: Check if the block is excavated.

methods.name: is_fix
methods.description: Check if the block is fixed.

methods.name: is_hidden
methods.description: Get hidden flag of a block.

methods.name: is_rigid
methods.description: Get rigid flag of a block.

methods.name: mass
methods.description: Get the block mass.

methods.name: master_slave
methods.description: Get master_slave flag of a block.

methods.name: moi
methods.description: Get the block block inertia (vector).

methods.name: moi_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the block block inertia.

methods.name: moi_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the block block inertia.

methods.name: moi_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the block block inertia.

methods.name: moment
methods.description: Get the block block moment (vector).

methods.name: moment_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the block block moment.

methods.name: moment_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the block block moment.

methods.name: moment_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the block block moment.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the block block position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the block block position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the block block position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the block block position.

methods.name: rvel
methods.description: Get the block rotational veolcity (vector).

methods.description: Get the x-component of the block rotational veolcity.

methods.description: Set the block density.
